item.title: [Segurança] Oracle E-Business Suite Flaw CVE-2026-46817 Actively Exploited in the Wild
item.description:
🚨 Oracle E-Business Suite Flaw CVE-2026-46817 Actively Exploited in the Wild
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
A critical security flaw impacting Oracle E-Business Suite has come under active exploitation in the wild, according to Defused Cyber. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-46817 (CVSS score: 9.8), refers to an improper privilege management and authentication flaw in Oracle Payments that could be abused to take over susceptible instances.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/oracle-e-business-suite-flaw-cve-2026.html

item.title: [Segurança] Progress Kemp LoadMaster Flaw Could Let Attackers Run Root Commands Pre-Auth
item.description:
🚨 Progress Kemp LoadMaster Flaw Could Let Attackers Run Root Commands Pre-Auth
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
A critical vulnerability in Progress Kemp LoadMaster can let an unauthenticated attacker execute arbitrary commands as root on the appliance by sending a crafted request to its API. The flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-8037, carries a CVSS score of 9.8 according to ZDI. If you run LoadMaster with the API enabled, update now.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/progress-kemp-loadmaster-flaw-could-let.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-10083 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-10083 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The APCu Manager WordPress plugin before 4.5.0 does not escape APCu object-cache keys before rendering them in an admin-area page, leading to a Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability. When a persistent object cache is enabled, cache keys derived from unsanitised user input (e.g. a transient name created by another APCu Manager WordPress plugin before 4.5.0 from an unauthenticated request) are output without escapi...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10083

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8483-1: HPLIP vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8483-1: HPLIP vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that HPLIP incorrectly handled certain print data. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause HPLIP to execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-8631) It was discovered that HPLIP incorrectly handled certain inputs. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8483-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8479-1: libheif vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8479-1: libheif vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that libheif incorrectly handled certain crafted HEIF files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service or execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-47178) It was discovered that libheif incorrectly validated offsets when decoding certain crafted HEIF files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8479-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8486-1: libssh2 vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8486-1: libssh2 vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 5.1
Resumo:
It was discovered that libssh2 incorrectly handled the sftp_symlink() function. A malicious SSH server or machine-in-the-middle attacker could possibly use this issue to obtain sensitive information or cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-15661) It was discovered that libssh2 had a pre-authentication denial of service vulnerability in the SSH_MSG_EXT_INFO handler. A malicious SSH server could possibly use this issue...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8486-1

item.title: [Segurança] Attackers Exploit SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558 to Deploy TaskWeaver and Djinn Stealer
item.description:
🚨 Attackers Exploit SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558 to Deploy TaskWeaver and Djinn Stealer
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
An unknown threat actor has been observed exploiting a recently disclosed maximum-severity security flaw in SimpleHelp to deliver two previously unreported malware families, TaskWeaver and Djinn Stealer. The intrusion involves the exploitation of CVE-2026-48558 (CVSS score: 10.0), a critical authentication bypass vulnerability impacting the OpenID Connect (OIDC) flow that an unauthenticated
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/attackers-exploit-simplehelp-cve-2026.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Faster Security Patching with Fewer Disruptions in VCF 9.1
item.description:
💣 Faster Security Patching with Fewer Disruptions in VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Quarterly maintenance windows, carefully choreographed change freezes, and weeks-long remediation timelines were designed for a threat environment that no longer exists. Today, AI-assisted security research, automated scanning tools, and expanded bug bounty programs have fundamentally compressed the window between vulnerability disclosure and active exploitation.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/30/security-patching-in-vcf-9/

item.title: [Segurança] CISA: Windows BlueHammer flaw now exploited by ransomware gangs
item.description:
💣 CISA: Windows BlueHammer flaw now exploited by ransomware gangs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
CISA confirmed on Monday that ransomware gangs are now exploiting a Microsoft Defender privilege escalation vulnerability, dubbed BlueHammer, that has previously been abused in zero-day attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-windows-bluehammer-flaw-now-exploited-by-ransomware-gangs/

item.title: [Segurança] Nissan discloses employee data breach linked to Oracle zero-day attacks
item.description:
💣 Nissan discloses employee data breach linked to Oracle zero-day attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Nissan is warning that it suffered a data breach affecting current and former employees after threat actors exploited an Oracle PeopleSoft vulnerability in data theft attacks previously linked to the ShinyHunters extortion group.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/nissan-discloses-employee-data-breach-linked-to-oracle-zero-day-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] NAIC says public data stolen in ShinyHunters' PeopleSoft breach
item.description:
💣 NAIC says public data stolen in ShinyHunters' PeopleSoft breach
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC) says the ShinyHunters extortion group stole only publicly available data, outdated logs, and configuration files after breaching its systems by exploiting a zero-day vulnerability in an Oracle PeopleSoft server.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/naic-says-public-data-stolen-in-shinyhunters-peoplesoft-breach/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Microsoft 365 Apps RCE Vulnerability Exploited Using a Malicious Excel File - CyberSecurityNews
item.description:
💣 Microsoft 365 Apps RCE Vulnerability Exploited Using a Malicious Excel File - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Episode 8: VCF 9.1 Cyber Resilience: From Attack to Recovery with Confidence - VMware

📰 Episode 8: VCF 9.1 Cyber Resilience: From Attack to Recovery with Confidence - VMware

Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a VMware, no contexto de segurança da informação.

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Installing Express Patches with VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
item.description:
📰 Installing Express Patches with VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
The security risks posed by frontier AI models make rapid response to any new security threats of utmost importance. Broadcom is taking steps to make sure that VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) is equipped for immediate patching, enabling organizations to act quickly to any threats that may arise.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/29/installing-express-patches-with-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] From Container Image to Production: Container Service in VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
item.description:
📰 From Container Image to Production: Container Service in VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Introduction The new Container Service in VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) offers an easy-to-start on-ramp to Kubernetes (K8s) consumption for your business, without requiring Kubernetes expertise. We have heard from many organizations that sometimes they “just want to run a container,” or they can’t hire the talent they would like to run workloads on Kubernetes, or …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/30/from-container-image-to-production-container-service-in-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1/
